ABOUT

Aspiring analyst, comfortable across the whole pipeline.

I'm a data analyst focused on turning raw data into actionable business insight through analysis, visualization, and reporting. I work with SQL, Python, Excel, Power BI, and PostgreSQL, with hands-on experience building end-to-end analytics projects that mirror real business scenarios — from data extraction and cleaning through EDA, KPI reporting, and dashboard development.

I believe great analytics means pairing technical skill with business understanding: it's not enough for a number to be correct, it has to be clear enough to act on. I'm continuously expanding my expertise in advanced SQL, statistics, and BI while finishing my degree.

Zepto SQL Data Analysis

Cleaned and analyzed a ~3,700-row e-grocery product catalog in pure SQL — schema design through business queries on pricing, discounting, and stock-outs.

38.4%top avg. discount — Beverages
27at-risk out-of-stock SKUs found
~3,700rows cleaned & analyzed

Data Clean Master

A Python application that automates data cleaning and preprocessing for CSV and Excel datasets — handling missing values, duplicate removal, data validation, and format standardization at scale.

10,000+records processed per dataset
70%+less manual cleaning effort
Hours → mincut from data prep time

Retail Sales Analysis

End-to-end SQL project — database design, data cleaning, and exploratory analysis on retail transaction data to answer real business questions about customers and sales patterns.

Top 5customers ranked by total spend
3sales shifts modeled with CASE logic
Window fnused to rank best month per year

SQLPythonPower BI

Customer Behavior Analysis

End-to-end analysis of retail customer shopping behavior — data cleaning and EDA in Python, business-question SQL queries, and an interactive Power BI dashboard on customer segments, loyalty, and purchase drivers.

3,900customer records analyzed
80%of customers segmented as "Loyal" (10+ purchases)
43%of transactions included a discount
